notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With David Fry batting, Travis Bazzana picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Cooper Pratt.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Drew Rom. Daniel Schneemann scores. Brayan Rocchio to 3rd. Kyle Manzardo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan singles on a line drive to right fielder Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: Joey Ortiz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joey Ortiz grounds into a double play, third baseman Gabriel Arias to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Cooper Pratt out at 2nd. Joey Ortiz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Chourio plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio hit by pitch. Christian Yelich to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: William Contreras pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras walks. Jake Bauers to 3rd. Cooper Pratt to 2nd.
